SSE (live dashboard updates: check-in, order, ticket events) · Outgoing webhooks + retry (BullMQ)

events · ticket_types · pricing_variants · orders · order_items · attendees · tickets
check_ins · form_schemas · form_submissions · promo_codes · invoices · badge_templates
